requirement_topic.en: EMC, Electrical Safety and Radio Type Approval — TBS conformity and TCRA (no CE marking in Tanzania)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容、电气安全与无线电型号核准——TBS合格评定及TCRA（坦桑尼亚无CE标志）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁兼容、電氣安全與無線電型號核准——TBS合格評定及TCRA（坦尚尼亞無CE標誌）

summary.en: Tanzania does NOT use CE marking; CE is an EU conformity mark and has no legal standing in Tanzania. Electromagnetic compatibility and electrical-safety conformity for lithium battery products and power banks is demonstrated against the applicable TZS standards (which adopt IEC/CISPR-based requirements) and verified through the TBS Pre-shipment Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme, resulting in a Certificate of Conformity and the TBS mark for regulated products. If the product incorporates any radio/wireless function (for example a power bank with wireless charging or Bluetooth), separate radio type approval from the Tanzania Communications Regulatory Authority (TCRA) is required before import and use. Energy labelling, where applicable, falls under EWURA. The mains nominal voltage in Tanzania is 230 V at 50 Hz — the 50 Hz frequency matches China, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, which is relevant for any bundled chargers/adapters.
summary.zh: 坦桑尼亚不使用CE标志；CE是欧盟合格标志，在坦桑尼亚无法律效力。锂电池产品及移动电源的电磁兼容和电气安全合格性，依据适用的TZS标准（采纳IEC/CISPR要求）证明，并经TBS装运前合格验证（PVoC）计划核验，进而取得受监管产品的合格证书及TBS标志。若产品含任何无线电/无线功能（例如带无线充电或蓝牙的移动电源），进口及使用前须另行取得坦桑尼亚通信监管局（TCRA）的无线电型号核准。适用时的能效标签由EWURA管辖。坦桑尼亚市电标称电压为230V、50Hz——50Hz频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国的220V单相/380V三相，对随附充电器/适配器具有相关性。
summary.zht: 坦尚尼亞不使用CE標誌；CE是歐盟合格標誌，在坦尚尼亞無法律效力。鋰電池產品及行動電源的電磁兼容和電氣安全合格性，依據適用的TZS標準（採納IEC/CISPR要求）證明，並經TBS裝運前合格驗證（PVoC）計劃核驗，進而取得受監管產品的合格證書及TBS標誌。若產品含任何無線電/無線功能（例如帶無線充電或藍牙的行動電源），進口及使用前須另行取得坦尚尼亞通信監管局（TCRA）的無線電型號核准。適用時的能效標籤由EWURA管轄。坦尚尼亞市電標稱電壓為230V、50Hz——50Hz頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國的220V單相/380V三相，對隨附充電器/適配器具有相關性。

standards_or_laws: TZS standards adopting IEC/CISPR EMC and electrical-safety requirements (Tanzania Bureau of Standards)
TBS Pre-shipment Verification of Conformity (PVoC) — Certificate of Conformity and TBS mark for regulated products
Electronic and Postal Communications Act — TCRA type approval for radio/wireless equipment
Energy and Water Utilities Regulatory Authority (EWURA) — energy labelling where applicable

summary.en: China's domestic EMC and electrical-safety route uses GB national standards (for example GB 17625 series for harmonics and GB 9254 / CISPR-based emission standards) and, for listed product categories, CCC compulsory certification administered by CNCA/SAMR; radio equipment is approved through SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval. These are Chinese domestic instruments: CCC marking and SRRC approval are not recognised in Tanzania, do not substitute for the TBS Certificate of Conformity, and do not substitute for TCRA type approval. CE marking does not feature in the Chinese framework either.
summary.zh: 中国国内的EMC及电气安全路径采用GB国家标准（例如GB 17625系列谐波标准和GB 9254/基于CISPR的发射标准），对于列入目录的产品类别还有由CNCA/SAMR管理的CCC强制认证；无线电设备通过SRRC（国家无线电管理）型号核准。这些属于中国国内制度：CCC标志和SRRC核准在坦桑尼亚不被认可，不替代TBS合格证书，也不替代TCRA型号核准。CE标志同样不属于中国框架。
summary.zht: 中國國內的EMC及電氣安全路徑採用GB國家標準（例如GB 17625系列諧波標準和GB 9254/基於CISPR的發射標準），對於列入目錄的產品類別還有由CNCA/SAMR管理的CCC強制認證；無線電設備透過SRRC（國家無線電管理）型號核准。這些屬於中國國內制度：CCC標誌和SRRC核准在坦尚尼亞不被認可，不替代TBS合格證書，也不替代TCRA型號核准。CE標誌同樣不屬於中國框架。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 / GB 17625 series — EMC emission and harmonics standards (SAC)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/SAMR) for listed categories — domestic China only
SRRC — State Radio Regulation of China type approval for radio equipment — domestic China only

gap.en: Two structural differences for Tanzania: (1) there is NO CE marking — exporters must not rely on an EU CE file; the operative control is the TBS Certificate of Conformity via PVoC against TZS-adopted IEC/CISPR standards plus the TBS mark; (2) wireless functions require a separate TCRA type approval that is wholly independent of TBS product conformity and of China's SRRC approval. Chinese CCC and SRRC documents are not transferable. Additionally, although Tanzania shares China's 50 Hz frequency, the 230 V nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V, so any bundled charger or adapter should be rated and labelled for 230 V / 50 Hz operation.
gap.zh: 坦桑尼亚有两项结构性差异：（1）没有CE标志——出口商不得依赖欧盟CE文件；实际管控是依据TZS采纳的IEC/CISPR标准、通过PVoC取得的TBS合格证书加TBS标志；（2）无线功能须另行取得TCRA型号核准，与TBS产品合格评定及中国SRRC核准完全独立。中国CCC和SRRC文件不可转移。此外，尽管坦桑尼亚与中国同为50Hz，但230V标称电压不同于中国的220/380V，因此任何随附充电器或适配器应按230V/50Hz运行额定并标注。
gap.zht: 坦尚尼亞有兩項結構性差異：（1）沒有CE標誌——出口商不得依賴歐盟CE文件；實際管控是依據TZS採納的IEC/CISPR標準、透過PVoC取得的TBS合格證書加TBS標誌；（2）無線功能須另行取得TCRA型號核准，與TBS產品合格評定及中國SRRC核准完全獨立。中國CCC和SRRC文件不可轉移。此外，儘管坦尚尼亞與中國同為50Hz，但230V標稱電壓不同於中國的220/380V，因此任何隨附充電器或適配器應按230V/50Hz運行額定並標註。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — EMC/electrical-safety conformity to TZS-adopted IEC/CISPR standards via TBS PVoC (Certificate of Conformity + TBS mark) before import; TCRA type approval mandatory for any radio/wireless function; no CE marking used in Tanzania
mandatory_status.cn: CCC certification mandatory for listed categories sold domestically; SRRC approval mandatory for radio equipment; both domestic China only

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Tanzania does not use CE marking. EMC and electrical-safety conformity is demonstrated against TZS-adopted IEC/CISPR standards and verified through the TBS PVoC programme (Certificate of Conformity plus TBS mark for regulated products). Any wireless function additionally requires TCRA type approval. Chinese CCC and SRRC documents do not transfer. Bundled chargers should be rated for 230 V / 50 Hz, noting the 50 Hz match but 230 V difference versus China.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 坦桑尼亚不使用CE标志。EMC及电气安全合格性依据TZS采纳的IEC/CISPR标准证明，并经TBS PVoC计划核验（受监管产品的合格证书加TBS标志）。任何无线功能还须取得TCRA型号核准。中国CCC和SRRC文件不可转移。随附充电器应按230V/50Hz额定，注意50Hz与中国相同但230V与中国不同。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 坦尚尼亞不使用CE標誌。EMC及電氣安全合格性依據TZS採納的IEC/CISPR標準證明，並經TBS PVoC計劃核驗（受監管產品的合格證書加TBS標誌）。任何無線功能還須取得TCRA型號核准。中國CCC和SRRC文件不可轉移。隨附充電器應按230V/50Hz額定，注意50Hz與中國相同但230V與中國不同。
